title: Database Management Tools Quiz
description: Test your fundamental knowledge about different database management tools and their role in modern web applications.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a 'Database GUI Client' (like TablePlus or DBeaver)?
options: To store all of the application's users.
To provide a visual interface for browsing tables, executing queries, and managing indexes across one or more databases.
To automatically generate a backup of the data.
To hide the application's IP address.

questions.question: Which of these is a popular, modern database client that supports multiple database types (SQL and NoSQL)?
What is an 'ER Diagram' (Entity-Relationship) and why is it useful?
options: A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
A visual representation of the tables in your database and how they relate across Foreign Keys, essential for understanding complex schemas.
A way to automatically compress files.

questions.question: Which tool provides a built-in GUI for browsing and editing data within its own schema file?
What's a common benefit of using an advanced CLI tool like 'pgcli' over the standard 'psql' terminal?
options: It adds 'auto-completion' and 'syntax highlighting' for your SQL commands, making the terminal much more productive.
To automatically generate a backup of the data.
